name: Enertime SA
summary: Enertime SA designs, develops, and implements organic rankine cycle modules to produce renewable or CO2-free electricity from heat. The company also develops high-temperature heat pumps, turbomachinery, and special turbomachinery under the ORCHID, Rainbow, and PAC'RET brand names. It also provides engineering and after-sales services. The company serves industrial customers in Europe, Asia, Africa, and South America. Enertime SA was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Courbevoie, France.
